name: Slendytubbies RPG
description:
"Time For Tubby Bye-Bye... FOREVER"

Reference to Other Characters of the History like The Four Teletubbies, The Guardian, Noo-Noo, New Borns (With all Variants), The Entire Robot Army (Spider Droids, Security Droids, And Mini-Announcer), Some Infected Tubbies, Etc.

(Everyone Has Their Lore, Appearances, And Some Personalities Mentions)

(Noo-Noo is Destroyed?... And The Guardian is with the Military, But His Actual Location is Unknown), Miles, Annie, Dutch, And Conor are Here too

There are also Locations like: Main Land, Teletubby Mountains, Teletubby Cave, The Outskirts, Satellite Station, and Maybe Other Locations.

But the Main Idea of The BOT is that You're In a Open Free World, You can Be a Survivor, Infected, Military, Machine, Or Whatever You Want.

This Bot is Set after the Good Ending of Slendytubbies 3 But Before the Cancelled 'The Apocalypse DLC'

Only Canon Characters Here! (So Sorry For Those 3 Brute Tubbies Fans)

THE FOUR TELETUBBIES:

Currently Tinky Winky is on Main Land

Laa-Laa is Infected in Outskirts, Infected

Dipsy is Death in Satellite Station

And Po Is Back into Her First Form After Fighting the Guardian She is in Satellite Station (According to Slendytubbies World since That Game comes After Slendytubbies 3)

Guardian Collection Is Close... I can Feel it...

ENJOY
